planSummary: Manual Chrome DevTools MCP QA gate for /bookings. Covers 14 blockers identified and fixed in the 2026-04-17 session.

cases.summary: B1 Relations missing in list API
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Seed demo data (3 employees, 3 services, 3 clients, 12 bookings).
2. Open /bookings as admin.
3. GET /api/v1/dashboard/bookings?page=1&limit=20.

Expected:
- API response includes nested client/employee/service (not just ids).
- Each row shows client, practitioner, type, datetime, amount.

Steps:
1. Open /bookings with seed data.
2. Observe columns: المريض / الممارس / النوع / التاريخ والوقت / المبلغ.

Expected:
- No cell shows "—" when the payload carries a value.
- Date formatted in ar-SA; amount via FormattedCurrency.

cases.summary: B3 Status badges render raw English enum
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Seed includes PENDING, CONFIRMED, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, NO_SHOW, EXPIRED, CANCEL_REQUESTED, AWAITING_PAYMENT.
2. Open /bookings.

Expected:
- Every badge in Arabic (بالانتظار / مؤكد / مكتمل / ملغي / لم يحضر / منتهي / طلب إلغاء / بالانتظار) with semantic colors.
- No enum identifier leaks to the UI.

cases.summary: B4 Detail sheet shows Unknown / undefined
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Click عرض التفاصيل on a pending booking.
2. Inspect sheet body.

Expected:
- Client, practitioner, specialty, service, date, time, duration all populated.
- No literal "Unknown", "undefined — undefined", "0 min".

cases.summary: B5 status-log TanStack query missing queryFn
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open browser devtools console.
2. Click عرض التفاصيل.

Expected:
- No React Query warning about missing queryFn.
- GET /dashboard/bookings/:id/status-log fires; sheet renders timeline or empty state.

cases.summary: B6 Delete opens generic AlertDialog instead of AdminCancelDialog
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Click the delete icon on a row.
2. Observe the dialog.

Expected:
- AdminCancelDialog opens directly (no prior AlertDialog prompt).
- Captures cancelReason, refundType, refundAmount (when partial), adminNotes.

cases.summary: B7 Wizard dies at step 4 (types endpoint missing)
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Click + حجز جديد.
2. Walk client -> service -> employee.
3. Observe step 4 (نوع الحجز).

Expected:
- Either the types render, or (single active type) the wizard auto-advances to datetime.
- GET /dashboard/people/employees/:id/services/:sid/types returns 200.

cases.summary: B8 Service prices shown as 1 / 2 SAR in wizard
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open wizard, step 2 (الخدمة).
2. Observe the price chip next to each service.

Expected:
- Prices render as the actual SAR amount (120 / 200 / 250 ر.س) — not divided by 100.

cases.summary: B9 Search input does not trigger refetch
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Type محمد in the filter search box.
2. Inspect Network.

Expected:
- After debounce (~300ms) a single GET /dashboard/bookings?search=... fires.
- Table narrows to matching rows.

cases.summary: B10 Reset button does not clear filters or refetch
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Apply time tab اليوم, pick a status, type something in search.
2. Click إعادة تعيين.

Expected:
- Search cleared, time tab back to الكل, status/type/employee back to all.
- Fresh GET /dashboard/bookings?page=1&limit=20 fires.

cases.summary: B11 Pagination shows "1 من 2" when totalPages=1
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Seed 12 bookings, perPage=20.
2. Load /bookings.

Expected:
- Server-side pagination hides when totalPages === 1.
- DataTable is rendered with serverPaginated=true so no extra client-side pager appears.

cases.summary: B12 Wizard employee step not filtered by service
cases.text:
Steps:
1. In the wizard, pick svc-1 (linked only to emp-1).
2. Observe employee picker at step 3.

Expected:
- GET /organization/services/:id/employees fires.
- Only employees linked to the service are shown.

cases.summary: B13 # column shows full id instead of first 8 chars
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Seed bookings with UUID ids.
2. Observe the # column.

Expected:
- Cell renders "#" + id.slice(0, 8) in monospace.

cases.summary: B14 Slots endpoint returns 404 in wizard
cases.text:
Steps:
1. In the wizard, reach step 5 (الموعد).
2. Pick any date.

Expected:
- GET /dashboard/people/employees/:id/slots?date=...&duration=... returns 200.
- Response shape: [{startTime, endTime}] (HH:mm strings).
- With availability configured, slot buttons appear; otherwise "لا توجد مواعيد متاحة".
